mapper.select: select id from enum_categories where category = #{category} limit 1
select id, category, category_name AS categoryName, description, is_system AS isSystem, is_enabled AS isEnabled from enum_categories where category = #{category} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into enum_categories(category, category_name, description, is_system, is_enabled) values(#{category}, #{categoryName}, #{description}, #{isSystem}, #{isEnabled})
